## Eagle Wealth Advisors Discloses $11.23 Million Stake in NVIDIA in 13F Filing

No actionable signal; noted only as flow noise coinciding with the concurrent NVDA earnings-revision debate.

- Eagle Wealth Advisors LLC reported an $11.23 million position in NVIDIA via a 13F filing.
- Small position; routine disclosure with no change in size or strategic rationale indicated.
